creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
More errors:

I have no clue where those errors occur from since they came with
recent updates in readline AND change towards CLANG 3.4.

I add some additional errors I missed in the primary PR.


cc  -O2 -pipe -O3 -march=native -I/usr/local/include -DLIBICONV_PLUG
-fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -L/usr/local/lib
-fstack-protector -L/usr/local/lib -o refdbd ris.o backend-risx.o
backend-mods.o backend-db31.o backend-teix.o backend-bibtex.o
backend-html.o backend-dbib.o backend-dbiba.o backend-citationlistx.o
linklist.o xmlhandler.backendn-html.o xmlhelper.o mset.o refdbdgetref.o
refdbdgetrefx.o refdbdupdb.o passwd.o refdbdcheckref.o svn_version.o
-lltdl -ldbi -lz -lexpat cc  -O2 -pipe -O3 -march=native
-I/usr/local/include -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector
-fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -L/usr/local/lib  -fstack-protector
-L/usr/local/lib -o eenc  e cc  -O2 -pipe -O3 -march=native
-I/usr/local/include -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector
-fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -L/usr/local/lib  -fstack-protector
-L/usr/local/lib -o bib2ris cc  -O2 -pipe -O3 -march=native
-I/usr/local/include -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector
-fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -L/usr/local/lib  -fstack-protector
-L/usr/local/lib -o refdbxp In file included from

readln.c:26: ./readln.h:28:3: error: unknown type name 'Function'
Function *func;               /* Function to call to do the job. */ ^

readln.c:96:39: error: use of undeclared identifier 'CPPFunction'
rl_attempted_completion_function = (CPPFunction *)refdb_completion; ^

readln.c:96:52: error: expected expression In file included from
client-commands.c:32: ./readln.h:28:3: error: unknown type

rl_attempted_completion_function = (CPPFunction *)refdb_completion;name
'Function'                                                   ^

  Function *func;               /* Function to call to do the job. */
  ^
3 errors generated.
